ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Larry Shockey, Esq. for Plaintiff: Daniel Patrick Terry, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Exhibits and Proposed Judgment rec'd in court, counsel stipulation for the return of the Exhibits along with the Judgment when is ready.

April 13, 2007
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $40,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $2,000.00
Costs $174.00
Other Costs$ 242.00, for a total of $42,416.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
